summary: Plan-only PR remediation assessment for five independent open PRs. No GitHub mutations are planned. No merge_candidate action is safe because the artifact does not contain the required merge preflight proof for Codex /review and resolved discussion/bot-comment state. One PR has a concrete contributor-branch repair path, one PR needs maintainer judgment due broad unrelated delta, and three are kept independent pending full merge preflight.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #90468 by addressing the member-requested parser regressions while preserving the contributor branch and credit.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(agents): preserve apostrophes without regressing quote concatenation
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
Repair #90468 on the contributor branch by keeping ordinary apostrophes and plural possessives literal while preserving documented shell-style single-quote concatenation.

## Credit
Based on source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/90468 by @yetval. Clownfish should preserve contributor attribution in the repaired branch/PR notes.

## Validation
- pnpm test packages/agent-core/src/harness/prompt-templates.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
credit_notes: Contributor credit: @yetval authored the original fix and follow-up parser refinements.
